strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, aligning with required AI skills
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating initiative and craftsmanship
concerns: Lack of explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright — key required technologies in the stack
No clear evidence of Kotlin or Java usage in recent roles, despite being required for select backend services
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep full-stack expertise, strong AI-agent experience, and a proven track record of building scalable, testable systems — all highly aligned with the role. However, the absence of confirmed experience with Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java raises concerns about immediate productivity. His open-source contributions and cross-stack adaptability suggest he can bridge these gaps quickly.
